title: podochilus scalpelliformis
intro: Podochilus scalpelliformis is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Podochilus scalpelliformis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and expectorant properties, which help to relieve symptoms of colds, bronchitis, and pneumonia. Herbal preparations of Podochilus scalpelliformis are typically made from the plant's leaves and roots, which can be dried, powdered, or made into infusions for consumption.
